ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region the country belongs to */,
  "population" TEXT /* Total population of the country */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "government_form" TEXT /* Form of government in the country */,
  "gdp_usd" TEXT /* GDP of the country in US dollars */,
  "gini_index" REAL /* Gini Index to measure income inequality */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Average life expectancy at birth */,
  "literacy_rate" REAL /* Literacy rate of the population */,
  "urban_population" REAL /* Percentage of the population living in urban areas */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the country's data */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO currency code for the country's currency */,
  "un_membership" INTEGER /* Year of UN membership (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hdi_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the HDI value is recorded */,
  "hdi_value" REAL /* HDI value for the specified year */,
  "life_expectancy_index" REAL /* Life expectancy component of the HDI */,
  "education_index" REAL /* Education component of the HDI */,
  "income_index" REAL /* Income component of the HDI */,
  "hdi_rank" INTEGER /* HDI rank of the country for the specified year */,
  "hdi_trend" TEXT /* Trend of HDI change (e.g., improving, declining) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the HDI data (e.g., UNDP, World Bank) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the data entry */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the HDI data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hdi_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
